zh.lifeSummary: 當Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz於1177年出生在俄羅斯Курская ОбластьКурск時，他的父親Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich26歲，母親Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik28歲。他和Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1212年9月享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz于1177年出生在俄罗斯Курская ОбластьКурск时，他的父亲Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich26岁，母亲Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik28岁。他和Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1212年9月享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andrej
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz was born in 1177, in Kursk, Kursk, Russia, his father, Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich, was 26 and his mother, Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik, was 28. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna. He died in September 1212, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz est né en 1177, à Kursk, Kursk, Russie, son père, Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna. Il est décédé en septembre 1212, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz 1177 in Kursk, Kursk, Russland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich 26 und seine Mutter Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik 28. Er hatte mit Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im September 1212 im Alter von 35 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz è nato il nel 1177 nel Kursk, Kursk, Russia, il suo padre, Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna. Morì nel settembre 1212, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowiczが1177年にロシアКурская ОбластьКурскで生まれた時，父Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavichは26歳，母Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurikは28歳であった。彼はDuchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikownaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1212年9月に35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz(이)가 1177년 러시아 Курская Область Курск에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 9월 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz nasceu em 1177, em Kursk, Kursk, Rússia, seu pai, Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1212, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz родился в 1177 г. в местности Курск, Курская Область, Россия, его отцу по имени Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik, 28. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna. Он умер сентябрь 1212 г. в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Światosław Andrej Igorowicz Rurykowicz nació en 1177, en Kursk, Kursk, Rusia, su papá, Duke of Novgorod-Seversk Igor Yurij Svyatoslavich, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jewfrosinija Jaroslavna Rurik, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Duchess of Kiev Jaroslawa Rjurikowna. Murió en septiembre de 1212, a la edad de 35 años.
